title: 實現 VSCode 的 JSON 結構式設定
content:
為應用程式開啟權限

首先我們會先為應用程式開啟權限，以至可以進行寫入與讀取。

<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />

預備模板文件

我們會在 Android Studio 專案新建一個 assets (/app/src/main/assets/) 資料夾，再新建兩個文件：

  • settings.json，是用來存放預設設定的值。
  • settings_empty.json，是一個空白結構供用戶把客製化設定寫入。
settings_empty.json
{
    // add any messages you want here to tell users how to customize settings
}
settings.json
{
    "editor_fontFamily": "JetBrainsMono-Medium",
    "editor_textSize": 16,
    "editor_textColor": "#FF0000",
}

獲取 assets 內的檔案內容

我們會用 InputStream 把 assets 的檔案資料寫入至外部存取。

private void getFileContentFromAssets(Context ctx, String fileName) {
    try {
        InputStream is = ctx.getAssets().open(fileName);
        int size = is.available();
        byte[] buffer = new byte[size];
        is.read(buffer);
        is.close();
        return new String(buffer);

    } catch (IOException e) {
        throw new RuntimeException(e);
    }
}

生成預設文件至外部存取空間

接下來，我們會把 settings.json 和 settings_default.json 寫入至外部存取空間。

  • settings.json 是供用戶進行客製化設定，所以會使用 settings_empty.json 模板文件；
  • settings_default.json 是存放預設設定，會用 settings.json 樣板文件。
private void generateDefaultFiles() {
    // generate settings default json file
    path = ConfigInitializer.mainLocation;
    file = "settings_default.json";
    FileUtil.writeFile(path + file, AssetsFileLoader.getFileContent(this, "settings.json"));

    file = "settings.json";
    if (FileUtil.isExistFile(path + file)) {
        FileUtil.writeFile(path + file, FileUtil.readFile(path + file));
    } else {
        String data = AssetsFileLoader.getFileContent(this, "settings_empty.json");
        FileUtil.writeFile(path + file, data);
    }
}

構建設定

匯入 Android Kotlin 庫，我們會用 Kotlin 語法構建數據類。

implementation 'org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-core:1.6.4'
implementation 'org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android:1.6.4'

這個數據類是用於新增可支援設定，例如 editor_textSize、editor_fontFamily、editor_textColor 和 editor_pinchZoom，你可以因應你的需要，新增客製化設定。

data class Config (

    // add any available settings you want here
    val editor_textSize: Float,
    val editor_fontFamily: String,
    val editor_textColor: Int,
    val editor_pinchZoom: Boolean

)

初始化設定

我們會用 Gson 庫把 settings.json 內的 JSON 轉化為 Config 類別的合適值。

implementation 'com.google.code.gson:gson:2.10.1'
public class ConfigInitializer {

    public static Config getConfig() {
        Config config;
        File targetFile = new File(APP_SETTINGS_JSON_FILE_PATH);
        String targetFileContent = targetFile.exists() ? FileUtil.readFile(targetFile.getPath()) : "";
        return config = new Gson().fromJson(targetFileContent, Config.class);
    }
    
    public static Config getDefaultConfig() {
        Config config;
        File targetFile = new File(APP_SETTINGS_JSON_FILE_PATH);
        // this file will keep updating.
        String targetFileContent = AssetsFileLoader.getFileContent(context, "settings.json");
        return config = new Gson().fromJson(targetFileContent, Config.class);
    }

    public static void set(ActivityMainBinding binding) {

        config = getConfig();
        defConfig = getDefaultConfig();

        String dataText = FileUtil.readFile(APP_SETTINGS_JSON_FILE_PATH);

        ...

    }

    public static boolean isDataExists(String str, String word) {
        return str.contains("\"" + word + "\"");
    }

}

判斷已加入設定

把設定應用至目標，例如，我要把 editor_textSize 的設定值應用至 EditText 的文本大小。

...
floatData = isDataExists(dataText, "editor_textSize") ? config.getEditor_textSize() : defConfig.getEditor_textSize();
binding.etEditor.setTextSize(floatData);

載入 JSON 設定

在目標活動頁 Activity 中載入 JSON 設定，把所有可支援設定初始化後，應用至相應組件。

private void loadJSONSettings() {
    ConfigInitializer.set(binding);
}

源始碼

implementation 'org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-core:1.6.4'
implementation 'org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android:1.6.4'

implementation 'com.google.code.gson:gson:2.10.1'

<application android:requestLegacyExternalStorage="true">

<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />

public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {

    @Override
    protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {

        ...

        if (isPermissionGranted) {
            generateDefaultFiles();
        }

    }

    @Override
    protected void onActivityResult(int requestCode, int resultCode, Intent data) {
        ...
    }

    private void generateDefaultFiles() {
        path = ConfigInitializer.mainLocation;
        file = "settings_default.json";
        FileUtil.writeFile(path + file, getFileContentFromAssets(this, "settings.json"));

        file = "settings.json";
        if (FileUtil.isExistFile(path + file)) {
            FileUtil.writeFile(path + file, FileUtil.readFile(path + file));
        } else {
            String data = getFileContentFromAssets(this, "settings_empty.json");
            FileUtil.writeFile(path + file, data);
        }
    }

    private void getFileContentFromAssets(Context ctx, String fileName) {
        try {
            InputStream is = ctx.getAssets().open(fileName);
            int size = is.available();
            byte[] buffer = new byte[size];
            is.read(buffer);
            is.close();
            return new String(buffer);

        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }

}


public class ConfigInitializer {

    public static Context context;

    public static Config config; // users set manually
    public static Config defConfig; // if setting hasnt been set by users, then set default config.

    public static final String APP_ROOT_FILE_LOCATION = "dynamicsettings"; // your project / app name

    // storage/emulated/0/dynamicsettings/settings.json
    public static final String APP_SETTINGS_JSON_FILE_PATH = FileUtil.getExternalStorageDir() + "/" + APP_ROOT_FILE_LOCATION + "/settings.json";

    public static String mainLocation = FileUtil.getExternalStorageDir() + "/" + App.APP_ROOT_FILE_LOCATION + "/";
    public static String assetsLocation = mainLocation + "assets/";

    // temp variables
    public static String strData;
    public static int intData;
    public static float floatData;
    public static boolean boolData;

    public static Config getConfig() {
        Config config;
        File targetFile = new File(APP_SETTINGS_JSON_FILE_PATH);
        String targetFileContent = targetFile.exists() ? FileUtil.readFile(targetFile.getPath()) : "";
        return config = new Gson().fromJson(targetFileContent, Config.class);
    }
    
    public static Config getDefaultConfig() {
        Config config;
        File targetFile = new File(APP_SETTINGS_JSON_FILE_PATH);
        // this file will keep updating.
        String targetFileContent = AssetsFileLoader.getFileContent(context, "settings.json");
        return config = new Gson().fromJson(targetFileContent, Config.class);
    }

    public static void set(ActivityMainBinding binding) {

        config = getConfig();
        defConfig = getDefaultConfig();

        String dataText = FileUtil.readFile(APP_SETTINGS_JSON_FILE_PATH);

        floatData = isDataExists(dataText, "editor_textSize") ? config.getEditor_textSize() : defConfig.getEditor_textSize();
        binding.etEditor.setTextSize(floatData);

    }

    public static boolean isDataExists(String str, String word) {
        return str.contains("\"" + word + "\"");
    }

}


data class Config (

    val editor_fontFamily: String,
    val editor_textSize: Float,
    val editor_textColor: Int,
    val editor_pinchZoom: Boolean

    ...

)

教學到這裏了，源始碼是不完整的，你需要自行補上缺陷，下篇文章見。
